calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Dave Davenport.
Robert McSparran, Esq. for Plaintiff Fitz Decosta Flemming II, also present.
Defendant, Richard Cardona present in pro per.
Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows: Stipulation for entry of judgment. Plaintiff entitled to restitution and possession of the premises located at 275 Waller St., Apt. #B (lower cottage), San Francisco. Stay of execution until 9:00 a.m. May 5, 2004.
A payment of $500.00 to defendant for pickup at 1388 Sutter St., suite #1000, on April 15, 2004 by noon.
Parties mutually release each other from all claims, but not including case #423303; Cardona vs. Flemming II.
Parties agreed to the stipulation in open court.
Matter is deemed settled and trial date vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-08-2004 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Richard Cardona, Defendant Propria Persona and Moving Party
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT RICHARD CARDONA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: Sustained with leave to amend. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/KMM/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
